name: Essential Black Tee
description: The Essential Black Tee is crafted from 100% premium Pima cotton for an ultra-soft feel that lasts. Designed with a modern slim fit silhouette, it's the perfect foundation piece for any wardrobe. Features a reinforced crew neck and double-needle stitched hem for durability.

name: Oversized Linen Blazer
description: Elevate your professional wardrobe with this oversized linen blazer. Cut from breathable, premium linen blend fabric, it drapes beautifully and keeps you cool. Features notch lapels, flap pockets, and a relaxed fit that works seamlessly from boardroom to brunch.

name: Indigo Selvedge Denim Jacket
description: This selvedge denim jacket is built to last a lifetime. Made from Japanese selvedge denim that develops a unique patina over time, it features a classic trucker silhouette with chest pockets, side adjusters, and antique brass hardware throughout.

name: Silk Slip Midi Dress
description: The Silk Slip Midi Dress is a wardrobe essential that transitions effortlessly from day to night. Crafted from 100% silk charmeuse, it features a V-neckline, adjustable spaghetti straps, and a fluid silhouette that skims the body beautifully.

name: Essential Oversized Hoodie
description: The Essential Oversized Hoodie is your new go-to comfort piece. Made from a heavyweight 400gsm cotton-fleece blend, it features a relaxed, boxy silhouette with dropped shoulders, a roomy kangaroo pocket, and a brushed interior for exceptional warmth.

name: Tactical Cargo Trousers
description: Modern cargo trousers reimagined for the urban explorer. Cut from a water-resistant ripstop fabric, they feature six utility pockets, tapered leg opening, and an elasticated waistband with adjustable drawcord.

name: Camel Wool Overcoat
description: A timeless investment piece, this camel wool overcoat is crafted from an Italian wool-cashmere blend. Featuring a double-breasted silhouette, satin lining, and a fluid, below-the-knee length, it provides exceptional warmth without sacrificing elegance.

name: Minimalist Leather Sneakers
description: Designed for the modern minimalist, these leather sneakers feature a clean silhouette crafted from full-grain Italian leather. The cushioned insole and lightweight rubber outsole provide all-day comfort, while the tonal lacing keeps the aesthetic sleek.

name: Ribbed Knit Turtleneck
description: A wardrobe staple, this ribbed turtleneck is knitted from a premium merino wool blend. The close-fitted silhouette and high neckline create a sleek, polished look that layers beautifully under coats and blazers.

name: Wide Leg Trousers
description: These wide-leg trousers offer a sophisticated, relaxed silhouette perfect for modern dressing. Made from a flowing viscose blend, they feature a high-rise waistband, side zip closure, and a pressed crease for a polished finish.

name: Relaxed Oxford Shirt
description: An enduring classic, the Relaxed Oxford Shirt is made from a soft, breathable Oxford-weave cotton. The relaxed fit provides effortless style, while the pin-collar and barrel cuffs add a refined touch to a casual silhouette.

name: Satin Wrap Blouse
description: The Satin Wrap Blouse brings effortless elegance to any occasion. Crafted from a lustrous satin fabric, it features a wrap-front design with a self-tie sash, long sleeves, and a V-neckline that flatters every silhouette.
